id.description: The server-generated ID of the report.

jobId.description: The ID of the job that created this report.

startTime.description: The start of the time period that the report covers.

endTime.description: The end of the time period that the report covers.

createTime.description: The date and time when the report was created.

downloadUrl.description: The URL from which the report can be downloaded.

jobExpireTime.description: The date and time when the job creating this report will expire.
